summary: Frontend Testing Complete - PrintableLabel component verified. Found and fixed bug: undefined printLabel function in GoodsReceiptWorkflow.jsx line 1518. LabelPrintModal shows QR-Code, Asset-ID, Typ, and Seriennummer-Barcode as required.
critical_code_review_comments: PrintableLabel.jsx exports correctly: printAssetLabel, LabelPreview, LabelPrintModal
GoodsReceiptWorkflow.jsx imports and uses PrintableLabel components at line 19
AssetManagementV2.jsx imports and uses PrintableLabel components at line 26
FIXED: Line 1518 in GoodsReceiptWorkflow.jsx had undefined printLabel function - changed to printAssetLabel(labelData)
@page { size: 62mm auto; } CSS correctly set for continuous roll printing in PrintableLabel.jsx
seed_data_creation: Used existing assets FRAT01-01-TAB-TSRi7 and MUCT01-02-KIT for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: PrintableLabel component is fully integrated. Test flow: Portal Login -> Assets tab -> Assets sub-tab -> Click printer icon on any row -> LabelPrintModal opens with QR-code, Asset-ID, Type, and Barcode. CSS optimized for Brother QL-820NWB 62mm continuous roll (DK-22205).

bug_fix_applied.impact: Print button in legacy Label Modal now works correctly after asset assignment
